seriesTitle: CBT Core Series for Adolescents - Series 1

forms.stageTitle: Understand, Choose and Act - Understanding What Is Happening
forms.title: What Is Going On for Me Right Now?
forms.therapeuticGoal: Help adolescents practice CBT core skill: What Is Going On for Me Right Now?.
forms.shortContentDescription: English translated worksheet 1.1, preserving the approved Hebrew source design and therapeutic purpose.
whenToUse: When a teen needs a structured CBT worksheet matching this skill area
When the user intent matches the worksheet content and stage
intentPhrases: what is going on for me right now?
understand, choose and act - understanding what is happening
